ksa_text: Knowledge of clinical data management standards and requirements, including Good Clinical Practice (GCP) principles, Electronic Data Capture (eCDC) systems, clinical data coding conventions (MedDRA, WHO Drug Dictionary), and data integrity requirements for regulatory submissions.
